message:
feat: conformance scenario expansion, planner refinement, decoder fix, registry test update, fwc enhancements

fcp-conformance/integration_scenarios.rs: Additional typed evidence
bundles and assertions for mesh resilience conformance scenarios.

fcp-mesh/planner.rs: Refinements to placement policy types.

fcp-raptorq/codec/decoder.rs: Minor fix in decoder test.

fcp-registry/tests/no_mock_integration.rs: Test adjustments for
registry verification flow.

fwc/main.rs: CLI feature additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
